hackathon.name: Spark
hackathon.theme: Build Anything onchain that solves a personal problem
constraints: Project MUST be new: no code committed before 2026-07-13T13:00:00Z (auto-disqualify)
Must have an onchain component on Monad MAINNET or TESTNET
Contract address required (Monad mainnet or testnet)
Post URL required for 'Most viral' prize
anti_slop: No AI slop: UI must fit viewport, unique identity, not obviously generated
No 'tutorial special' (todo app / weather dashboard / beginner React ideas)
No 'mystery box': needs README, demo video, setup instructions
No vaporware: real working feature, not hardcoded success toasts
judging_agent_checks: Live working app, not static placeholder data
hackathon.deployment_hint: Monskills skill available for frontend + Monad smart-contract deploy via coding agent

docs.faucet: Monad testnet faucet for testnet MON

product.category: Monad Testnet (default; upgrade to Mainnet if verified E2E)

context: Monskill skill loaded for Monad deploy path
All committed code must be after 2026-07-13T13:00:00Z
resume: Read /root/monadglyph/MGlyph.session.json to restore context and continue.
